prompt: Using the provided reference image, isolate the front-center dancer and transform her into a cute collectible chibi figure inspired by the same Awa Odori pose and costume. Keep the pink kimono, woven amigasa hat, raised arms, one-leg-up dance step, and overall festival identity, but replace the real person with a polished toy-like stylized character on a small wooden display base. Create a clean 2x2 multi-angle product sheet with 4 views: front view, back view, left-side profile, and a side-by-side left/right profile pair. Use a soft warm studio background with creamy bokeh instead of the crowded festival scene. Make it look like a high-end figurine photo shoot, with crisp details, gentle depth of field, and consistent lighting across all four panels.
